paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently 6.78, with a change of 10.78% from the prior close and a change of -24.41% over the last 21 sessions. There have been 2 new news items in the last 24 hours.

Recent news headlines include "RCS - Fermi Inc. - Second Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Call Date" from TradingView and "Why Did FRMI Stock Tumble More Than 28% In After-Hours Trading Today?" from Stocktwits. The news items mention the company's second quarter 2026 earnings release and call date, as well as the departure of CEO Toby Neugebauer.

There have been various SEC filings recently, including a SCHEDULE 13G and multiple 8-K forms, with a total of 25 filings in the feed and 1 Form 4 filing. The 8-K forms disclose the issuance of convertible senior notes, the resignation of a director, and the commencement of an offering for the sale of convertible senior notes.
